articles.title: Sentences of boys spared custody over Hampshire rape referred to Court of Appeal, PM says
articles.description: The sentences of boys spared custody over the rape of two girls in Hampshire will be referred to the Court of Appeal, the prime minister has said.

articles.title: BP chairman removed over 'serious' conduct concerns
articles.description: Senior independent director Amanda Blanc says the board has been "surprised and disappointed" to learn of the issues.

articles.title: US launches new strikes on Iran, targeting missile sites and boats
articles.description: US Central Command says the strikes were taken in "self-defence", while Iran reports it downed a US drone that entered its airspace.

articles.title: Three teens dead after being in water at beauty spots
articles.description: Three teenagers were found in water in separate incidents across England on Bank Holiday Monday.
